title: Productboard Spark official positioning
claim: Productboard presents Spark as a specialized product agent that helps PMs move from idea to delivery-ready outputs using customer context and conversational exploration.
source_snippet: Spark is positioned as an AI product agent for idea exploration, customer understanding, and document generation.
implication: ProductOS must beat document generation alone by making artifact lineage and gate state explicit across the lifecycle.
followup_questions: How often do Spark outputs preserve stage-by-stage approval lineage outside Productboard?
